name: grid
description: A 24-column responsive grid system (Ant Design Row/Col parity): grid.row is a CSS-grid container (grid-template-columns:repeat(24,...)), grid.col is a cell that spans N of the 24 tracks with an optional left offset. The column math is expressed via inline grid-column styles (fully static -- no dynamic Tailwind col-span-* classes a scanner would purge). Row controls gutter (none|small|middle|large on the --lv-space-* scale, or a raw length), justify, and align. Server-first PARTIAL, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the grid row + col partials to your JTE root at lievit/grid/. Use @template.lievit.grid.row(gutter=..., content=@`...`) as the 24-column container and @template.lievit.grid.col(span=N, offset=M, content=@`...`) for each cell (span 1..24, offset 0..23). gutter="small|middle|large" (token scale) or a raw length controls the column gap; justify/align control distribution. The source is yours: edit freely.
